nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, “Do not learn the way of the nations, And do not be terrified by the signs of the heavens Although the nations are terrified by them;

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: “Learn not the way of the nations, nor be dismayed at the signs of the heavens because the nations are dismayed at them,

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣說： “你們不要學習列國的行徑， 列國因天象驚惶， 你們卻不要因這些驚惶。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “不要效法列国的行为。 他们被天象吓倒， 你们却不要因天象而害怕。
